title: Mackerel en Papillote with Canadian Peas
description: Delicious and healthy mackerel dish baked in the oven with Canadian peas and herbs. A great way to enjoy the omega-3 rich mackerel with minimal effort.
instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. Place the mackerel fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Drizzle the olive oil over the mackerel.
5. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Place a few Canadian peas on top of each mackerel fillet.
7. Place a lemon slice on top of each mackerel fillet.
8. Sprinkle minced garlic over the mackerel.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
10. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
